name: health-checkup-report
description: Generate customer security health checkup HTML reports from SOAR/XDR data.

scripts.check: node --check health_report.js && node --check src/args.js && node --check src/data_client.js && node --check src/incident_excel_stats.js && node --check src/mock_data.js && node --check src/template_renderer.js && node --check src/xdr_asset_client.js && node --check tests/data_client.test.js && node --check tests/renderer.test.js && node --check tests/xdr_asset_client.test.js
scripts.test: node tests/data_client.test.js && node tests/renderer.test.js && node tests/xdr_asset_client.test.js
